tweets.text:
And these have mostly worked! I did have 1 day where I lost ~150, but only 1 other day losing Elo!

I’ve had 3 days where I didn’t reach my target — but no slides is a win! 

Which leaves 9 days where I hit my target - with 2 really big climbs! Speaking of climbing (8/13)

Inside my Quest for Champion Tier Trainer

Last season I was at 2358 Elo and I panicked that I wouldn’t end the season in Champions tier. “One more game” turned into a slide down to 2150 Elo

The bar ended at 2355. I was gutted 😭❤️‍🩹

So I made a plan to make it this time (1/13)
